raw_request: Build a complete NQ futures momentum signal pipeline. 1. Create a Python module at strategy_factory/signals/momentum.py that implements a configurable EMA crossover detector with 10/30 period defaults. 2. Add a volume confirmation filter that requires volume to be above the 20-period moving average on crossover bars. 3. Implement a VIX regime gate that disables all signals when VIX is above 25, reading VIX data from the daily features parquet. 4. Write comprehensive unit tests at tests/test_momentum_signal.py covering: normal crossover, volume rejection, VIX suppression, missing data handling, and edge cases with flat EMAs. 5. Add a CLI entry point that can run the signal on historical NQ data and output a summary of crossover events with dates and directions.
